title: Tag Unity Catalog functions
body: Functions are now a supported securable object type for tagging in Unity Catalog. Use `SET TAG` and `UNSET TAG` to add and remove tags from functions. You can use tags to search for functions and certify or deprecate functions. Tagging functions and procedures requires Databricks Runtime 18.1 or above. See [Apply tags to Unity Catalog securable objects](/aws/en/database-objects/tags).

ref_links.text: Apply tags to Unity Catalog securable objects
